summary: Tightened the chapter 6 to chapter 7 handoff by carrying the corridor's lingering physical aftermath into the opening, and sharpened the closing kitchen-versus-school contrast to better set up chapter 8's return to the kitchens.
edits: Linked the opening manuscript change to three nights of residual corridor pain in Owen's palm.
Added a closing beat that frames the kitchen as work rather than punishment before Owen goes back upstairs.
